name: MonthView
searchText: monthview standalone schedule month view component @mantine/schedule /schedule/month-view candragevent consistentweeks date events firstdayofweek getdayprops getweeknumberprops highlighttoday labels locale maxeventsperday mode monthyearselectprops moreeventsprops nextcontrolprops ondatechange ondayclick oneventclick oneventdragend oneventdragstart oneventdrop onexternaleventdrop onslotdragend onviewchange onweeknumberclick previouscontrolprops radius recurrenceexpansionlimit renderevent rendereventbody scrollareaprops todaycontrolprops viewselectprops weekdayformat weekenddays withdragslotselect witheventsdraganddrop withheader withoutsidedays withweekdays withweeknumbers

props.name: canDragEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be dragged

props.name: consistentWeeks
props.description: If set, always renders 6 weeks in the month view

props.name: date
props.description: Date to display, Date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD 00:00:00 format

props.name: events
props.description: Events to display

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description: Number 0-6, where 0 – Sunday and 6 – Saturday.

props.name: getDayProps
props.description: Props passed down to the day button

props.name: getWeekNumberProps
props.description: Props passed down to the week number button

props.name: highlightToday
props.description: If set, highlights the current day

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels override for i18n

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale passed down to dayjs, overrides value defined on DatesProvider

props.name: maxEventsPerDay
props.description: Maximum number of events visible per day before "+more" indicator shows, value is clamped between 1 and 10

props.name: mode
props.description: Interaction mode: 'default' allows all interactions, 'static' disables event interactions

props.name: monthYearSelectProps
props.description: Props passed down to MonthYearSelect component in the header

props.name: moreEventsProps
props.description: Props passed down to MoreEvents component

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed to next month control

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called with the new date value when a date is selected

props.name: onDayClick
props.description: Called when day is clicked

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when event is clicked

props.name: onEventDragEnd
props.description: Called when any event drag ends

props.name: onEventDragStart
props.description: Called when any event drag starts

props.name: onEventDrop
props.description: Called when event is dropped on new date

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onExternalEventDrop
props.description: Called when an external item is dropped onto the schedule. Receives the DataTransfer object and the drop target datetime.

props.name: onSlotDragEnd
props.description: Called when a day range is selected by dragging

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when view level select button is clicked

props.name: onWeekNumberClick
props.description: Called with first day of the week when week number is clicked

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed to previous month control

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: recurrenceExpansionLimit
props.description: Max number of generated recurring instances per recurring series

props.name: renderEvent
props.description: Function to fully customize event rendering, receives all props that would be passed to the root element including children

props.name: renderEventBody
props.description: Function to customize event body, event object is passed as first argument

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to ScrollArea component

props.name: todayControlProps
props.description: Props passed to today control

props.name: viewSelectProps
props.description: Props passed to view level select

props.name: weekdayFormat
props.description: dayjs format for weekdays names. By default, the first letter of the weekday.

props.name: weekendDays
props.description: Indices of weekend days, 0-6, where 0 is Sunday and 6 is Saturday. The default value is defined by DatesProvider.

props.name: withDragSlotSelect
props.description: If set, enables drag-to-select day ranges

props.name: withEventsDragAndDrop
props.description: If true, events can be dragged and dropped

props.name: withHeader
props.description: If set, the header is displayed

props.name: withOutsideDays
props.description: If set, days from the previous and next months are displayed to fill the weeks

props.name: withWeekDays
props.description: If set, weekdays names are displayed in the first row

props.name: withWeekNumbers
props.description: If set, week numbers are displayed in the first column
